name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_NucleicAcid
title: R5: Data items specific to nucleic acids (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.nucleicAcid` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.nucleicAcid` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubstanceNucleicAcid)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.nucleicAcid` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubstanceNucleicAcid)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.nucleicAcid` has a context of SubstanceSpecification based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.nucleicAcid` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
